name: MCCARRAN EUROPEAN OAK W CLASSIC
description: McCarran European Oak Classic offers the true, natural elegance of wide-plank European oak. With its sophisticated wire-brushed finish and ultra-matte protective wear layer, this engineered wood flooring perfectly balances timeless beauty with modern durability.

name: MCCARRAN EUROPEAN OAK SEASIDE
description: Inspired by coastal living, the Seaside variant features soft, whitewashed oak tones that brighten up any room. The multi-ply engineered core provides exceptional dimensional stability, allowing installation over various subfloors.

name: MCCARRAN EUROPEAN OAK SHADOW
description: For those seeking a bolder aesthetic, the Shadow oak presents deep, smoky grey and charcoal hues. The wide 7.5-inch planks make spaces feel larger and more luxurious, ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
